_comment: Manual corrections for build_catalog.py's kart-signal heuristic. force_include: center IDs that are genuinely karting but whose product names never say the word 'kart' (e.g. UK/IE tracks that just say 'Race'/'GP'/'Timed Session', or ones identified by chassis/engine brand names). force_exclude: center IDs the heuristic wrongly let through. Edit freely as you spot-check the catalog.

_force_include_reasons.134: ELK Motorsport (UK) - 'Timed Session/Sprint Racing/Solo+Team Endurance' is standard UK indoor kart-track vocabulary
_force_include_reasons.137: WhiteRiver Park (IE) - same 'Time-Trial/Grand Prix/Team Endurance Race' taxonomy
_force_include_reasons.226: Booosters (AT) - products reference 'SODI', a major go-kart chassis brand
_force_include_reasons.409: SB RACEWAY - '6.5 hp race' and '2Drive' are classic rental-kart engine/chassis specs
_force_include_reasons.501: Circuit de l'indre (FR) - 'Session Rotax' references Rotax Max, a kart-specific engine brand
